profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Manage your account information and preferences
profile.schoolEditDescription: Select an existing school or type a new name below. New entries will be created after verification.
profile.schoolSearchPlaceholder: Search for a school or enter a new name
profile.schoolInputHint: Choosing from the list keeps the directory consistent. Typing a new name will create it for everyone after review.
profile.schoolNoResults: No matching schools. Enter a new name above.
profile.turnstileNotice: Verification is required to prevent automated updates.
profile.schoolCreatePending: A new school entry has been submitted and will be created after verification.
profile.schoolCreateSuccess: New school created and associated with your account.
profile.schoolCreateFailed: Failed to create the new school. Please try again later.
profile.schoolPendingApproval: School creation submitted and pending verification. It may take up to 24 hours.
profile.editDescription: Update your personal information and preferences
profile.editInfoHint: Need to update your school? Use the editor below and complete the short verification to keep the directory healthy.
profile.noUserData: User profile is not available yet. Please try again later.

passkey.title: Passkey
passkey.description: Securely log in with your fingerprint, face, or device lock.
passkey.notSupported: Your browser or device does not support passkeys
passkey.supportReasonInsecureContext: This page is not running in a secure context. Use HTTPS or localhost.
passkey.supportReasonMissingWebauthn: This browser does not expose WebAuthn support.
passkey.supportReasonMissingCredentialsApi: This browser does not expose the Credentials Management API.
passkey.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this passkey?
passkey.deleteUnavailable: Passkey deletion is not yet available
passkey.editDescription: Update the display name used for this passkey in your list.
passkey.editHint: Leave blank to show this passkey as unnamed.
